testcase.name: stackinRingsFlow

error.message: element click intercepted: Element <button class="w-full h-16 my-5 border font-sans text-sm xl:text-lg 3xl:text-2xl 4xl:text-3xl 4xl:leading-none transition-colors duration-300 uppercase tracking-widest focus:outline-none border-theme-blue hover:bg-theme-blue bg-white text-theme-blue hover:text-white disabled:bg-white disabled:text-gray-400 disabled:border-gray-400 disabled:cursor-not-allowed" aria-label="Proceed to checkout" aria-disabled="false" aria-busy="false" id="checkout-button" value="Continue">...</button> is not clickable at point (1335, 481). Other element would receive the click: <iframe title="Re:amaze Chat" allow="microphone; camera" allowfullscreen="" allowtransparency="true" style="width: 100% !important; height: 100% !important; border: 0px; position: relative;"></iframe> (Session info: chrome=134.0.6998.36) Build info: version: '4.28.1', revision: '73f5ad48a2' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '21.0.5' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Command: [dc1fff7da930a0b0c41a3e6aa3f8dd55, clickElement {id=f.44D3709968F2A57CECE96A5628C11788.d.27A5CE7791153F491F1AF3F23C54E069.e.174}] Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 134.0.6998.36, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 134.0.6998.88 (7e3d5c978c6d..., userDataDir: C:\Users\Naveen\AppData\Loc...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:63504}, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:63504/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 134.0.6998.36, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Element: [[ChromeDriver: chrome on windows (dc1fff7da930a0b0c41a3e6aa3f8dd55)] -> xpath: //button[text()='Checkout']] Session ID: dc1fff7da930a0b0c41a3e6aa3f8dd55

testcase.error: org.openqa.selenium.ElementClickInterceptedException: element click intercepted: Element <button class="w-full h-16 my-5 border font-sans text-sm xl:text-lg 3xl:text-2xl 4xl:text-3xl 4xl:leading-none transition-colors duration-300 uppercase tracking-widest focus:outline-none border-theme-blue hover:bg-theme-blue bg-white text-theme-blue hover:text-white disabled:bg-white disabled:text-gray-400 disabled:border-gray-400 disabled:cursor-not-allowed" aria-label="Proceed to checkout" aria-disabled="false" aria-busy="false" id="checkout-button" value="Continue">...</button> is not clickable at point (1335, 481). Other element would receive the click: <iframe title="Re:amaze Chat" allow="microphone; camera" allowfullscreen="" allowtransparency="true" style="width: 100% !important; height: 100% !important; border: 0px; position: relative;"></iframe> (Session info: chrome=134.0.6998.36) Build info: version: '4.28.1', revision: '73f5ad48a2' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version:
